bird.summary: The striated antbird (Drymophila devillei) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds…

locations.name: 科恰班巴省
locations.summary: 科恰班巴省（西班牙語：Departamento de Cochabamba）是玻利維亞中部的一個省份，省会为科恰班巴。全省面積为55,631平方公里，2024年人口数量为2,005,373人。 下分16縣。

locations.name: 马代拉河
locations.summary: 马代拉河（葡萄牙語：Rio Madeira）是南美洲的河流，河道全長約3,350公里，是亞馬遜河右岸最長的支流。 2007年7月，巴西政府批准興建兩座用作水力發電的水壩，遭環境人士以破壞生態環境為由反對。

locations.name: 馬莫雷河
locations.summary: 馬莫雷河（Río Mamoré）是玻利維亞的大型河流，也是亞馬遜河的主要支流之一，河道全長1,930公里（1,200英哩），平均流量為每秒11,649立方米，流域面積637,401.1平方公里。 參考資料 Edward D.

locations.name: 聖克魯斯省 (玻利維亞)
locations.summary: 聖克魯斯省（西班牙語：Departamento de Santa Cruz）是玻利維亞東部的一個省份，东北與巴西接壤、東南與巴拉圭接壤，面积370,621平方公里，也是该国九個省中面積最大者，省会为聖克魯斯。下分15縣。2024年人口3,…

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

locations.name: 亞馬遜盆地
locations.summary: 亞馬遜盆地（葡萄牙語：Bacia do rio Amazonas），又稱亞馬遜平原，是南美洲的亞馬遜河及其支流所流經之處，盆地與平原地形兼具。 地理 南美洲的亞馬遜雨林（60%面積位於巴西）位於亞馬遜盆地，是全球最大的雨林，佔地6百萬平方…

relations.subject: Striated antbird
relations.evidence: It separately occurs in a larger area from southeastern Peru south into Bolivia as far as Cochabamba Department and east into Brazil to the Rio Madeira

relations.subject: Striated antbird

relations.subject: Striated antbird
relations.evidence: subochracea is found in Brazil south of the Amazon and east of the rios Madeira and Mamoré south into northeastern Bolivia's Santa Cruz Department

relations.subject: Striated antbird
relations.evidence: The species inhabits the understorey of humid evergreen forest where it is almost entirely found in stands of Guadua bamboo

relations.subject: Striated antbird
relations.evidence: The striated antbird has one large continuous range in the Amazon Basin's southwest as well as the south-central area in the countries of southeastern Peru, northwestern Bolivia and Brazil

relations.subject: Striated antbird
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered rare in Colombia and Ecuador and locally fairly common in Peru. "Human activity has little direct effect on the Striated Antbird, other than the local effects of habitat destruction."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
